{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Alin's acorn
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] possesses an acorn trapped inside a small golden birdcage.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] can use [[Elysia]]'s light on the acorn.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
